milestones.title: Light-driven flagella-like motion of coordination compound single crystals
milestones.description: Demonstrating unprecedented flagella-like motion in coordination polymers under light stimulation, opening new blueprints for micro-actuators.

milestones.title: Photo-responsive Coordination Networks for Gas Storage
milestones.description: A study on how light-induced structural changes can modulate the pore size of MOFs for controlled gas release.

milestones.title: Medishetty Lab Welcomes New PhD Scholars
milestones.description: The group continues to expand with three new researchers joining the team to explore solid-state photochemistry.
